name: get_user_tweets
description: Retrieve tweets posted by a specific user, identified by their numeric user ID. Returns the user's tweets in reverse chronological order. Supports pagination, time-based filtering, and field selection. Useful for analyzing a user's posting history or monitoring their activity.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric user ID whose tweets you want to retrieve. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of tweets to return per request. Value between 5 and 100. Default is 10.

parameters.name: tweet.fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tweet fields to return. Options include: created_at, public_metrics, source, lang, entities, attachments, conversation_id.

parameters.name: pagination_token
parameters.description: Pagination token from a previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Only return tweets created after this time.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Only return tweets created before this time.

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tweet types to exclude. Options: retweets, replies.

data.text: Starship launch attempt scheduled for next week. Fingers crossed!
Tesla FSD v13 rolling out this weekend to all US vehicles.
